creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I was testing your patch and it seems to be failing like this:

http://pd.valinor.palantiri.org/data/11amd64-default/2014-12-19_00h11m40s/logs/errors/libcmime-0.1.15.log

Can you please look into it and send updated patch that fixes these issues?

Kind regards,
Bartek Rutkowski
